basic_details.job_title: AIIMS Rishikesh Senior Resident Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 95 Posts
basic_details.organization_name: All India Institute of Medical Sciences (AIIMS), Rishikesh
basic_details.short_information: All India Institute of Medical Sciences (AIIMS), Rishikesh is a premier medical institute in Uttarakhand. The table below summarizes the key details of this recruitment drive.

important_dates.raw: Notification Date: 05 July 2026 Online Application Start Date: 05 July 2026, 10:00 hrs Online Application Last Date: 04 August 2026, 17:00 hrs Eligibility (qualification, age) reckoned as on: 04 August 2026 (last date of application submission)

age_limit.details: The upper age limit till completion of Senior Residency is 45 years as on the last date of submission of the online application form (04 August 2026). Age relaxation will be applicable as per Government of India rules and regulations, as amended from time to time. Candidates who have already completed 3 years of Senior Residency are not eligible to apply for these posts.

qualification.details: The essential qualification differs for medical and non-medical candidates, as detailed below. | A postgraduate medical degree, namely MD/MS/DNB/DM/MCh, in the respective discipline from a recognized University/Institute, or an equivalent qualification. | Applicable only for the Departments of Anatomy, Biochemistry, Pharmacology, and Physiology: | M.Sc. / M.Biotech degree in the subject concerned, and Ph.D. in the subject concerned or an allied subject from a recognized University/Institute.

salary_details.details: Selected candidates will be paid as per Level 11 of the Pay Matrix under 7th CPC, plus Non-Practicing Allowance (NPA) as applicable.

as decided by the Competent Authority. The written test/interview will be conducted at AIIMS Rishikesh. No TA/DA will be paid to candidates for attending the written test or interview.

or Autonomous Institutions must submit a No Objection Certificate (NOC) from their employer at the time of the interview. SC/ST candidates must submit a certificate issued by a Tehsildar or an officer of equivalent or higher rank
in the standard Central Government format. PwBD candidates must submit a disability certificate signed by a duly constituted Medical Board of a State or Central Government Hospital/Institution
how_to_apply: Interested and eligible candidates must apply online through the official AIIMS Rishikesh website. Follow these steps:
Visit the official AIIMS Rishikesh website at www.aiimsrishikesh.edu.in.
Locate the online application link for Senior Resident (Non-Academic) Recruitment, Advt. No. 2026/08.
Register and fill in the online application form with accurate personal, educational, and professional details.
Upload the required scanned documents and photographs as specified.
Pay the applicable application fee online based on your category.
Submit the application form before 04 August 2026, 17:00 hrs.
Download and keep a printout of the submitted application form, as it must be brought to the Recruitment Cell at AIIMS Rishikesh along with relevant documents on the date of the interview.
Note: A separate application must be submitted online for each post if a candidate wishes to apply for more than one department/post.
important_instructions: Vacancies advertised under the EWS category will not be carried forward as backlog if a suitable EWS candidate is not available; other category candidates may apply provisionally and will be considered as UR candidates only if the EWS vacancy remains unfilled. As the vacancies are advertised for financial year 2026-27, only OBC-NCL certificates issued on or after 01 April 2026 will be considered valid. The EWS certificate must be valid for financial year 2026-2027, issued on or after 01 April 2026 and on or before the last date of application submission, based on income of the year 2025-2026. No relaxation is available to SC/ST/OBC candidates applying for Unreserved (UR) vacancies. Reservation for SC/ST/OBC/PwBD/EWS shall be applicable strictly as per Government of India policy. The tenure of appointment is 1 year, renewable, subject to performance and institute requirements. Candidates should regularly check the official AIIMS Rishikesh website for any Addendum, Deletion, Corrigendum, or other updates, as such information will only be published there.

content_sections.heading: AIIMS Rishikesh Senior Resident Recruitment 2026 Overview
content_sections.text: All India Institute of Medical Sciences (AIIMS), Rishikesh is a premier medical institute in Uttarakhand. The table below summarizes the key details of this recruitment drive.

rows.details: All India Institute of Medical Sciences (AIIMS), Rishikesh

content_sections.heading: AIIMS Rishikesh Senior Resident Recruitment 2026 Important Dates
content_sections.text: Notification Date: 05 July 2026 Online Application Start Date: 05 July 2026, 10:00 hrs Online Application Last Date: 04 August 2026, 17:00 hrs Eligibility (qualification, age) reckoned as on: 04 August 2026 (last date of application submission)

content_sections.heading: AIIMS Rishikesh Senior Resident Recruitment 2026 Vacancy Details
content_sections.text: AIIMS Rishikesh has advertised a total of 95 Senior Resident (Non-Academic) posts across 29 departments. The category-wise breakup is given in the table below. Note: The Executive Director, AIIMS Rishikesh, reserves the right to increase, decrease, or cancel vacancies, including reserved category vacancies, as per Government of India rules and requirements.

content_sections.heading: AIIMS Rishikesh Senior Resident Recruitment 2026 Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Eligibility for AIIMS Rishikesh Senior Resident Recruitment 2026 is assessed as on the last date of online application submission, i.e., 04 August 2026. Below are the key eligibility conditions: Candidates must have passed the qualifying examination by the last date of application submission, with the result declared by that date. The tenure of the qualifying degree must also be completed by the last date of application submission. Candidates who have already completed 3 years of Senior Residency will not be considered eligible for these posts. OBC candidates must belong to the Non-Creamy Layer (NCL) as per the Central List of OBC, and their sub-caste must match the entries in that list. The OBC-NCL certificate must be issued on or after 01 April 2026 to be considered valid. EWS candidates must submit a valid Income and Assets Certificate for financial year 2026-2027, issued on or after 01 April 2026 and on or before the last date of application submission, based on income of the year 2025-2026. No age or eligibility relaxation is available to SC/ST/OBC candidates applying against Unreserved (UR) vacancies.

content_sections.heading: AIIMS Rishikesh Senior Resident Recruitment 2026 Educational Qualification
content_sections.text: The essential qualification differs for medical and non-medical candidates, as detailed below. A postgraduate medical degree, namely MD/MS/DNB/DM/MCh, in the respective discipline from a recognized University/Institute, or an equivalent qualification. Applicable only for the Departments of Anatomy, Biochemistry, Pharmacology, and Physiology: M.Sc. / M.Biotech degree in the subject concerned, and Ph.D. in the subject concerned or an allied subject from a recognized University/Institute.

content_sections.heading: AIIMS Rishikesh Senior Resident Recruitment 2026 Age Limit
content_sections.text: The upper age limit till completion of Senior Residency is 45 years as on the last date of submission of the online application form (04 August 2026). Age relaxation will be applicable as per Government of India rules and regulations, as amended from time to time. Candidates who have already completed 3 years of Senior Residency are not eligible to apply for these posts.

content_sections.heading: AIIMS Rishikesh Senior Resident Recruitment 2026 Pay Scale / Salary
content_sections.text: Selected candidates will be paid as per Level 11 of the Pay Matrix under 7th CPC, plus Non-Practicing Allowance (NPA) as applicable.

content_sections.heading: AIIMS Rishikesh Senior Resident Recruitment 2026 Application Fee
content_sections.text: The application fee is non-refundable and must be paid online only. The fee structure is as follows: If a candidate wishes to apply for more than one post, a separate application form must be filled and submitted online for each post.

content_sections.heading: AIIMS Rishikesh Senior Resident Recruitment 2026 Selection Process
content_sections.text: The mode of selection may be a Written Test, an Interview, or both, as decided by the Competent Authority. The written test/interview will be conducted at AIIMS Rishikesh. No TA/DA will be paid to candidates for attending the written test or interview. Candidates working in Central/State Government, Semi-Government, or Autonomous Institutions must submit a No Objection Certificate (NOC) from their employer at the time of the interview. SC/ST candidates must submit a certificate issued by a Tehsildar or an officer of equivalent or higher rank, in the standard Central Government format. PwBD candidates must submit a disability certificate signed by a duly constituted Medical Board of a State or Central Government Hospital/Institution, countersigned by the Medical Superintendent.

content_sections.heading: AIIMS Rishikesh Senior Resident Recruitment 2026 Documents Required
content_sections.text: Candidates must carry the following original documents, along with one set of self-attested photocopies, at the time of the interview: Proof of application fee deposit (if any) Identity proof (PAN Card, Passport, Driving License, Voter Card, Aadhaar Card, etc.) Address proof Date of birth certificate (Birth Certificate / 10th Certificate) Class 10th and 12th mark sheets and certificates Qualifying degree documents: MBBS/UG mark sheets and certificates; MD/MS/DNB/DM/MCh PG mark sheet and certificate (verified by MCI) Attempt Certificate Registration with the Medical Council of India / State Medical Council Experience Certificate (copy of internship completion for medical candidates) SC/ST/OBC/EWS Certificate issued by the competent authority (if applicable) PwBD Certificate issued by the competent authority (if applicable) No Objection Certificate for candidates working in Government institutions Publications, if any Four recent passport-size colour photographs Fee receipt Any other relevant document

content_sections.heading: AIIMS Rishikesh Senior Resident Recruitment 2026 How to Apply Online
content_sections.text: Interested and eligible candidates must apply online through the official AIIMS Rishikesh website. Follow these steps: Visit the official AIIMS Rishikesh website at www.aiimsrishikesh.edu.in . Locate the online application link for Senior Resident (Non-Academic) Recruitment, Advt. No. 2026/08. Register and fill in the online application form with accurate personal, educational, and professional details. Upload the required scanned documents and photographs as specified. Pay the applicable application fee online based on your category. Submit the application form before 04 August 2026, 17:00 hrs. Download and keep a printout of the submitted application form, as it must be brought to the Recruitment Cell at AIIMS Rishikesh along with relevant documents on the date of the interview. Note: A separate application must be submitted online for each post if a candidate wishes to apply for more than one department/post.

content_sections.heading: AIIMS Rishikesh Senior Resident Recruitment 2026 Important Instructions
content_sections.text: Vacancies advertised under the EWS category will not be carried forward as backlog if a suitable EWS candidate is not available; other category candidates may apply provisionally and will be considered as UR candidates only if the EWS vacancy remains unfilled. As the vacancies are advertised for financial year 2026-27, only OBC-NCL certificates issued on or after 01 April 2026 will be considered valid. The EWS certificate must be valid for financial year 2026-2027, issued on or after 01 April 2026 and on or before the last date of application submission, based on income of the year 2025-2026. No relaxation is available to SC/ST/OBC candidates applying for Unreserved (UR) vacancies. Reservation for SC/ST/OBC/PwBD/EWS shall be applicable strictly as per Government of India policy. The tenure of appointment is 1 year, renewable, subject to performance and institute requirements. Candidates should regularly check the official AIIMS Rishikesh website for any Addendum, Deletion, Corrigendum, or other updates, as such information will only be published there.

faq.question: Q1. What is AIIMS Rishikesh Senior Resident Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: It is a recruitment drive by All India Institute of Medical Sciences, Rishikesh (Advt. No. 2026/08) to fill 95 posts of Senior Resident (Non-Academic) on a tenure basis across 29 departments.

faq.question: Q2. What is the last date to apply for AIIMS Rishikesh Senior Resident Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The online application window closes on 04 August 2026 at 17:00 hrs.

faq.question: Q3. How many vacancies are there in AIIMS Rishikesh Senior Resident Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: A total of 95 vacancies are available across 29 departments, including Anaesthesiology, General Medicine, General Surgery, Radiotherapy, Obs. & Gynae, and others.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for AIIMS Rishikesh Senior Resident posts?
faq.answer: The upper age limit is 45 years as on the last date of application submission, with relaxation as per Government of India rules. Candidates who have already completed 3 years of Senior Residency are not eligible.

faq.question: Q5. What is the pay scale for AIIMS Rishikesh Senior Resident posts?
faq.answer: Selected candidates will be paid as per Level 11 of the Pay Matrix under 7th CPC, plus Non-Practicing Allowance (NPA) as applicable.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application fee for AIIMS Rishikesh Senior Resident Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The fee is Rs. 1,200/- (plus transaction charges) for UR, EWS, and OBC (NCL) candidates, and Rs. 500/- (plus transaction charges) for SC/ST candidates. PwBD candidates are exempt from the fee.

faq.question: Q7. What is the qualification required for AIIMS Rishikesh Senior Resident posts?
faq.answer: Medical candidates need a postgraduate medical degree (MD/MS/DNB/DM/MCh) in the relevant discipline. Non-medical candidates (only for Anatomy, Biochemistry, Pharmacology, and Physiology) need an M.Sc./M.Biotech degree plus a Ph.D. in the subject concerned or an allied subject.

faq.question: Q8. What is the tenure of the Senior Resident post at AIIMS Rishikesh?
faq.answer: The tenure is 1 year, renewable, subject to institute requirements and performance.
